title: BANXE process_ref
description: Stable handle that uniquely names a canonical business process definition and its version. Encodes the logical intent->process resolution contract fixed by ADR-048 D3 and consumed by ADR-049 D2 (process_ref = {process_id, version}). LOCAL MIRROR: the canonical schema in banxe-architecture is not yet authored (ADR-048 D3 defers the concrete format to sprint work); this file mirrors the {process_id, version} contract so the registry is validatable in-repo. Promote to banxe-architecture/schemas/ when that schema lands.

process_id.description: Stable process identifier, derived from the ArchiMate id (leading 'id-' stripped). Kebab-case.

version.description: Semantic version of the process definition. A process_ref always names a specific version; older versions remain resolvable (ADR-048 D4).
